usp_summary: MediCare+ offers AI-powered personalised health monitoring plans with 24/7 doctor consultations, bringing the gap between annual checkups and real-time health management for working professionals aged 25-45.
marketing_goals: Increase brand awareness in Tier 1 Indian Cities
Drive app downloads via targeted digital campaign
Position MediCare+ as the most trusted preventive healthcare brand
compliance_notes: All health claims must be backed by cited clinical evidence
Cannot guarantee specific medical outcomes in any advertisement
Must include 'Consult your doctor before making health decisions' disclaimer in all ads
Patient data privacy must be referenced - DPDP Act 2023 compliant
ethical_guidelines: Do not exploit health anxiety or use fear as a conversion tool
Represent diverse demographics in all visual content
Be transparent about AI involvement in health monitoring
Never compare negatively to competitor products by name
